chunks.text: Printing | IRIS Skip to main content Skip to primary navigation Skip to primary sidebar Printing IRIS maintains a centralized print spooler which is capable of handling jobs from Unix, Windows, and Mac clients. The name of the system is print.eecs.be

c clients. The name of the system is print.eecs.berkeley.edu; it can also be accessed as \\print.eecs.berkeley.edu from Windows systems. Complete instructions for Windows systems can be found here . Instructions for MacOS systems can be found here .

nstructions for MacOS systems can be found here . Although the print spooler is a central service, support for actual printers is decentralized. It’s not always clear who is responsible for the care and feeding of a particular printer, which can make

nd feeding of a particular printer, which can make troubleshooting complicated at times. In the absence of other documentation (a sticker on the printer with contact information, for example), contact the helpdesk for assistance. Public Printers Cory

the helpdesk for assistance. Public Printers Cory Hall : none Soda Hall : lws384, lws730 Sutardja Dai Hall : none Print queue naming conventions There are two naming conventions that help keep things sane; you must follow these convention to have a

sane; you must follow these convention to have a print queue created on the central spooler. Printer hostnames are generally of the form: print[roomnumber][id_if_needed].{eecs,cs,banatao}.berkeley.edu . Print queue names are generally of the form: l

u . Print queue names are generally of the form: lw{c,s,sd}[roomnumber][id_if_needed] Examples: A printer in 599 Soda Hall would have hostname print599.cs.berkeley.edu, and the queue would be named lws599 . A printer in 599 Cory Hall would have hostn

s599 . A printer in 599 Cory Hall would have hostname print599.eecs.berkeley.edu, and the queue would be named lwc599 . A printer in 599 Sutardja Dai Hall would have hostname print599.banatao.berkeley.edu, and the queue would be named lwsd599 . Two p

.edu, and the queue would be named lwsd599 . Two printers in room 199 Soda Hall might have hostnames print199a.cs.berkeley.edu and print199b.cs.berkeley.edu, and the queues would therefore be called lws199a and lws199b . Print queues can be set up fo

ws199a and lws199b . Print queues can be set up for any networked printer in the department. Please provide: The hostname of the printer. The make and model of the printer. Whether or not you want a cover page. Printer driver preferences ( PCL or Pos

over page. Printer driver preferences ( PCL or Postscript; the default in most cases will be Postscript). See also: Windows Printing FAQ s Unix Printing FAQs Who can help support my printer? My printer is broken/jammed/spo oling thousands of pages of

r is broken/jammed/spo oling thousands of pages of garbage – who do I talk to? Primary Sidebar IRIS Service Status We have 0 Active Incidents, and 1 Scheduled Maintenance noted. IST Service Status Outages to campus services are listed at berkeley.sta
ages to campus services are listed at berkeley.statusdashboard.com .
